title: Filix-mas patens
taxonomy: Filix-mas patens is classified as a species of fern within the family Dryopteridaceae. This species is also known as the royal fern, and it is native to parts of North America and Europe. The classification of Filix-mas patens is further broken down into the kingdom Plantae, phylum Pteridophyta, class Polypodiopsida, and order Polypodiales. As a member of the Polypodiales order, it is part of a group of ferns that are characterized by their unique spore-producing structures. The classification of Filix-mas patens is an important aspect of understanding its evolutionary history and relationships with other plants.
